text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Fan Fest, and I believe Hishi
Akebono said she was going to participate in a
sumo wrestling tournament.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the venue to cheer for her, and
when I arrive there...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hiii-yah!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And she's pushed her opponent out with an
overhand throw! It's a win for Hishi Akebono, so
she'll be moving on to the finals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The entire place is already bursting with energy
and excitement.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hi Trainer! Thanks for coming to watch me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yeah, I'm glad they're enjoying themselves
so much!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've loved sumo wrestling for a long time now, so I
can't help but get really fired up about it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Actually wrestling is so different from just
watching it. Getting to grapple others with all I've
got is tons of fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's cheering for me, so I've gotta make
sure the final match is as exciting as possible!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
U-um, excuse me! I-I love watching your races
and Umastalives! So, um, good luck in the final
match!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you so much for all your support! It
means a lot to me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll enjoy today's match, too! ♪ I'm
gonna do my best, so keep your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: I-I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, the curtains rise on the final
match of the sumo wrestling tournament!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No matter the time or place, I must never forfeit
victory! Come, let us battle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'll give it my all too! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: ...Aaand begin!

text_block_list.name: Bono & Kawakami
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: Oh! They've got each other in a tight grip! It's a battle of pure strength now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: K-Kawakami! You're... really strong!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
R-right back at you... Akebono! You're quite
powerful... yourself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I've got you now!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And Hishi Akebono has managed to grasp onto
her opponent's belt! Will she be able to force
Kawakami Princess out of the ring?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess... I must fight with all my spirit, even
in the most dire of situations!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and the tables have turned! That's a clean
overhand throw and—Kawakami Princess wins!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aah! I was so close! But still, I had lotsa fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You really are strong, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, goodness. Truthfully, you were so strong that
I completely forgot myself and went overboard...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I think I might have thrown you a little too hard,
but are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I'm totally fine! Actually, I'm glad you
threw me with all your might, without holding
back!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's have another match one day, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, of course! I would be delighted to wrestle
with you once more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their bond has deepened after their intense bout,
and as the pair shake hands, the crowd showers
them with deafening applause!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: H-Hishi Akebono! Please do your best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has hoisted Kawakami Princess out
of the ring by her belt! Hishi Akebono wins!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew! You were so strong, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan A
text_block_list.text: Dang, that was intense! I got goosebumps just watching that match!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we're fans for life now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thank you! I'm glad you had fun! Thanks for
your support! ☆

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Um! I, uh, just wanted to say... congratulations on
your win!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you! I heard you cheering for me! It made
me really happy!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You heard me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Thanks to you, I found one last spurt of
energy! It's amazing how strong you made me
feel! Thank you for that!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: O-oh no, I hardly did anything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're actually going to have a little chanko party
after this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Come along if you like! You can eat till you're
full, then head on home! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then! Time to get ready for the party!
Trainer, could you lend me a hand, please?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I made about a hundred servings' worth of
chanko, and it's kind of a lot. I was hoping you
could help me carry it out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You think we'll need more?
choice_data_list: No, no. It's enough. You sure worked hard on it.
No, no. It's enough. You sure worked hard on it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I sure did! I've been letting it simmer since
last night!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's not every day I get to meet my fans, so I want
to make sure everyone can have something
yummy before they go home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chanko party that day proves to be a great
opportunity for Hishi Akebono to get to know her
fans a lot better.
